versions.version_description: This version of Little Jeannie is best played with barre chords but open chords sound good too. No capo is required.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

recommended.version_description: Corrected vocal melody and percussion hits that had been distorted in transfer.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F/D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh little Jeannie,         you got so much love, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb/F[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]      [ch]F/A[/ch]
And you take it where it strikes and give it to the likes of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh little Jeannie,         she got so much love, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]      [ch]F/A[/ch]
So I see you when I can, you make me all a man can be[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]      [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C/E[/ch]
Oh there were others who would treat you cruel[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
And oh Jeannie,   you were always someone's fool[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Little Jeannie,        you got so much time, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb/F[/ch]            [ch]C/G[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]
Though you've grown beyond your years, you still retain the fears of youth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh little Jeannie,       you got so much time, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb/F[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch]     [ch]F/A[/ch]
But you're burning it up so fast, searching for some lasting truth[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]      [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C/E[/ch]
Oh there were others who would treat you cruel[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
And oh oh Jeannie,    I will always be your fool[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
[ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]      [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C/E[/ch]
Oh there were others, and I've known quite a few[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
But oh oh Jeannie,    I'm still in love with you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F/A[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh Jeannie (Oh Jeannie)    I'm so in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Stepped into my life from a bad dream[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh Jeannie (Oh Jeannie)    I'm so in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Stepped into my life from a bad dream[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh Jeannie (Oh Jeannie)    I'm so in love with you[/tab]
